shareModal.title: Share Access Link
shareModal.desc: Scan the QR code or copy the link. Opening it auto-logs in without manually entering the token.
shareModal.noToken: This token has no plaintext value and cannot generate a share link

createModal.title: Create Access Token
createModal.roleDesc: Set the permission level for this token
createModal.authorizedOperatorsDesc: Select which operators this token can control
createModal.maxOperatorsDesc: Maximum operators for this token (0 = unlimited)

loginCredential.sectionDesc: Username/password is only a convenience mapping to this token. All permissions still come from the token itself.
loginCredential.initNoneDesc: Keep token login only and do not enable username/password quick login.
loginCredential.initAdminDesc: The administrator sets the username and password immediately, and may optionally allow later self-service changes.
loginCredential.initSelfServiceDesc: Do not set a username/password now. The user can configure it later in Account Security.
loginCredential.statusConfigured: Quick login is configured. Current username: {{username}}
loginCredential.statusNotConfigured: Username/password quick login is not configured.
loginCredential.passwordPlaceholderRequired: Required when enabling for the first time
loginCredential.passwordPlaceholderOptional: Leave empty to keep current password
loginCredential.passwordDescriptionRequired: A password is required the first time username/password login is enabled.
loginCredential.passwordDescriptionOptional: Leave empty to keep the current password; fill in to reset it.
loginCredential.allowSelfService: Allow this token to set or change its own username/password after login
loginCredential.clearHint: Saving will remove the current username/password mapping. If self-service remains enabled, the user can set it again later.
loginCredential.selfServiceInitHint: The user can log in with the token first, then set a username/password later in Account Security.
loginCredential.selfServiceEnabledHint: The user is currently allowed to change the username or password after login.
loginCredential.selfServiceDisabledHint: Only administrators can set, reset, or clear the username/password right now.
loginCredential.passwordRequiredForCreate: A password with at least 8 characters is required the first time this login method is enabled
loginCredential.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

created.title: Token Generated
created.warning: Please save this token securely. It will only be shown once and cannot be retrieved later:
created.howToUseDesc: Open the URL below on another device and paste the token to log in. Or use the share button on any token in the list to get a one-click login link and QR code.

loginPage.subtitle: Digital Radio Remote Control
loginPage.helpContent: Contact your station administrator for either an access token or a username/password mapped to a token. They can manage both in the TX-5DR desktop app under Settings → Token Management.

accountSecurity.title: Account Security
accountSecurity.boundToToken: This account is bound to token: {{label}}
accountSecurity.configuredHint: Username/password quick login is currently configured.
accountSecurity.notConfiguredHint: Username/password quick login is not configured yet.
accountSecurity.passwordPlaceholderRequired: Required when configuring for the first time
accountSecurity.passwordPlaceholderOptional: Leave empty to keep current password
accountSecurity.passwordDescriptionRequired: A password with at least 8 characters is required when enabling this for the first time.
accountSecurity.passwordDescriptionOptional: Leave empty if you only want to change the username.
accountSecurity.selfServiceDisabled: The administrator has not allowed this token to manage its own username/password. Please contact an administrator.
accountSecurity.loadFailed: Failed to load account security settings

permissions.title: Extra Permissions
permissions.description: Grant additional management capabilities to this operator
permissions.frequencyRestrictionHint: Leave presets and ranges empty to allow all frequencies
permissions.frequencyRestrictionAllowAll: No presets or ranges selected; all frequencies are allowed

errors.token_revoked_or_expired: Token has been revoked or expired
errors.self_service_disabled: This token is not allowed to manage its own username/password
errors.password_required: A password is required the first time username/password login is set
